title: Cheryl’s Curried Chicken Salad
ingredients: Cheryl gave me this recipe in the early 1990s. It quickly became a staple recipe when I hosted baby and bridal showers. I made a massive amount for Tiffany Valentine’s wedding reception, served in mini croissants. This recipe is yummy as a salad with greens, avocado slices, and fresh tomatoes; or a salad with greens, fresh fruit (grapes, pineapple, strawberries, cantaloupe) and avocado; or served in croissants with avocado and sliced iceberg lettuce; or served in butter lettuce cups.
2/3 cup mayonnaise (my favorite is Best Foods)
2 ½ cups cooked chicken breast, diced
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together the following ingredients to make the curry dressing:
Add the dressing and stir well. Serve on platter with ¼ cup toasted, slivered almonds (if not serving to Grant).
